full_text:
Experimental Plan

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization S492_pOme

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1. *Using trypsin and collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

1 hour C&H

2. *Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

30 min dispase + 1 hour C&H

Experimental Steps:

1. *Sample Preparation*:

Collected ovarian tumor samples

Washed big tissue pieces twice with HBSS.

Minced the tumor piece into small pieces using a sterile scalpel and scissors, and divided the minced tissue into two equal parts.

2. *Dissociation Protocols*:

*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions*:

Treated sample with C&H for 1 hour at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions: 70 µm cell strainer

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transfer the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, wash the stainer with 5 ml media, and discard the leftover tissue pieces.

Centrifuge the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C

RBC lysis: 3 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 15 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media and prepared a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry.

*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions*:

Treated sample with dispase for 30 minutes (at +37°C rotating). Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions. Keep the tissue leftovers.

For cell suspension (dispase only):

RBC lysis: 3 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 15 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media, and prepared a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry, and freezing.

Further, the leftover tissue was dissociated with C&H for 1 h at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions

RBC lysis: 3 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 15 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media, and prepared a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry.

Cell counts:

Since I could not run flow cytometry on 10.10.2024, I froze multiple aliquots to do the flow staining later.

dispase: 3x 4 E6 cells (for future flow) and 3x 5 E6 cells (for biobanking)

C&H: 3x 4 E6 cells (for future flow)

dispase + C&H: 9x 10 E6 cells (for future flow)

3. *Flow Cytometry*:

Thawed 1 vial of Dispase and C&H with 10E6 cells, 2 vials of Dispase with 4 E6 cells, and 2 vials of C&H with 4 E6 cells. Once the vials were thawed, transferred the content to a falcon tube with 5 ml DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged 1000 rpm for 10 min at +4C, and resuspended the pellets in 5 ml media. The cells were in the media on the ice for at least 1 hour before starting the staining. Calculated the cells:

Samples were stained together with S493_iOme on 14.10.2024 and 15.10.2024.

Multicolor samples with 1.5 E6 cells each.

2x MC dispase + C&H

1x MC C&H

1x MC dispase

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

For multicolor samples and a-SMA and PDGFRb FMO samples, the antibodies were diluted in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon) (see calculations above), 50 µl of the antibody mix was added to each sample, and the samples were incubated for 30 min at RT shielded from light.

For the remaining FMO samples, the cells were added to the needed amount of Brilliant Stain buffer (see table above), and then the antibodies were added one by one. They were incubated for 30 min at RT, and shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and incubated for 5 min at +4°C.

Centrifuged, washed the pellet with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next day, centrifuged, diluted intracellular antibodies in Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended into 50 µl antibody mix (all multicolor samples and from FMO samples all except a-SMA and PDGFRb). For a-SMA and PDGFRb FMO samples, the needed amount of Permeabilization buffer and the antibodies were first added one by one. Incubate for 30 min at RT shielded from light.

Washed once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspended in 350 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through a 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, 2 µl of each antibody was used.

the same antibodies except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

for aSMA, 2.5 µl instead of 2 µl

Incubated for 45 min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.
